articles.title: Metatek Group to launch first Toronto Stock Exchange technology IPO since 2021
articles.description: Shares of the British geophysical services company are set to start trading on the exchange next week
articles.content:
Canada is getting its first tech sector initial public offering in nearly five years.

articles.title: Fujitsu failed to pay ‘a single penny’ of £2bn Horizon bill
articles.description: MPs condemn technology firm for winning new public contracts while the taxpayer shoulders compensation costs for the Post Office scandal
articles.content:
Fujitsu has yet to contribute a single penny to the £2 billion cost of compensation for victims of the Post Office Horizon scandal despite acknowledging a moral obligation to do so more than two years ago, MPs will say today.
A report by the House of... [4650 chars]

articles.title: IMT Nagpur to host convocation ceremony on 14th
articles.description: institute of management technology (imt), nagpur, will host its convocation ceremony for the pgdm batch of 2023-2025 on march 14 at its campus in nagpur. the occasion will celebrate the academic achievements of the graduating cohort and recognise their journey through the institute’s rigorous management programme. atul jain, managing director at vip industries limited, will attend the ceremony as the chief guest. he will address the graduating students and share insights drawn from his extensive leadership

articles.title: Area farmers help ‘change the story’ through Nitrogen Challenge
articles.description: Agriculture is facing many challenges these days, not the least of which is low commodity prices coupled with higher input costs. Another concern has to do with how the over-application of nitrogen fertilizer may be leading to the rise of harmful nitrates in our area’s groundwater. One local UNL Extension educator is addressing some of those issues with a challenge of her own to area producers – use available technology to apply only the amount of nitrogen the particular field needs during the growing season.
articles.content: Agriculture is facing many challenges these days, not the least of which is low commodity prices coupled with higher input costs. Another concern has to do with how the over-application of nitrogen fertilizer may be leading to the rise of harmful nit... [6230 chars]

articles.title: Exclusive: BESI attracts takeover interest as advanced chip packaging demand surges, sources say
articles.description: BE Semiconductor Industries has been fielding takeover interest, as demand for its chip-packaging technology has become more critical for semiconductor equipment ​makers, according to three people familiar with the matter.
articles.content: The Amsterdam-listed chip equipment maker, ‌which has a market value of 14 billion euros ($16.20 billion), has been working with investment bank Morgan Stanley to evaluate the approaches, two of the people said, requesting anonymity as the discussion... [2121 chars]
